name: Ankheg

traits.name: Bite Grapple
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as a STR DC 13 save rider applying grappled] On a hit, if the target is a Large or smaller creature it is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends the ankheg can bite only the grappled creature and has advantage to do so. The bite-only restriction and advantage are not modeled.

traits.name: AC While Prone
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] The ankheg's AC is 11 while prone. The engine uses a single AC value.

strategy: Burrow up beneath a victim, bite to grapple and hold it, and save the 30-ft acid line for a moment when several foes cluster and nothing is grappled.
